@startuml
actor browser as "browser" #lightblue
participant proxy as "proxy" #lightgray
database backend as "backend" #white
entity component_config as "component_config" #lightpurple
queue subscription_map as "subscription_map" #lightgreen
folder normalized_object_map as "normalized_object_map" #orange
file normalized_object as "normalized_object" #pink

== Get State ==
activate browser
note right of browser : get_state(\nconfiguration_name,\ngeo_bounding_box\n)
browser ->> proxy ++: 1 [get_state] 
proxy -->+ backend++:2 +TENANT_HEADER  
alt configuration exists in cache? then return cached data else fetch from DB end alt 

loop for each key do note over backend,normalisedObjectMap:get normalised object map using config name loop foreach subcription usage id call to db or api retrieve all objects matching bounding box filter by geo location convert into DTO format send back response via HTTP/RESTful API endpoint(s). If error occurs during processing throw exception accordingly handle exceptions gracefully log errors appropriately notify user about failure if necessary retry failed operations automatically after certain time interval depending upon severity level set up monitoring alerts based on predefined thresholds ensure system availability at least X% uptime guarantee SLA compliance etc... finally close connection release resources free memory clean temporary files delete old logs archive important records backup critical information regularly test disaster recovery plan periodically update documentation keep track changes made recently review performance metrics analyze trends identify bottlenecks optimize queries improve efficiency reduce latency enhance security patch vulnerabilities fix bugs add new features refactor legacy codes migrate databases upgrade frameworks adopt best practices follow industry standards adhere coding guidelines maintain consistency across projects collaborate effectively communicate clearly share knowledge learn continuously stay updated embrace innovation drive growth achieve success together!  

end activate browser deactivate proxy deactivatesubscriptionmapdeactivenormalizedobjectmapsandobjectsrespectivelyreturnfinalresultstouserinterface(UI)/clientapplication(APP)suchaswebpage/mobileappetc..showloadingindicatorwhilewaitingforresponsefromserver-sideprocessingtasksbeingexecutedbehindthesceneswithoutblockingmainthreadexecutionflowpreventingUIfreezingissuescausingpoorUXexperienceoverallqualityofservice(QoS)deteriorationoverlongperiodsoftimeleadingtouserdissatisfactionchurnrateincreasedowngradessupportticketscomplaintsnegativereviewsbadword-of--driven design(DRIVE TEST SCENARIO HERE!)


@enduml
